title: Omnitrix Ultimate: Totem of Undying
description: Convert your boring totem of undying into Ben 10's Ultimatrix! And save the overworld!
body:
# **🌀 Go Ultimate! - Ultimatrix Totem**
![The Super Omnitrix on your wrist!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d02a6b33acd73b861e199109905daf9264d67eb2.jpeg)

## **Evolution is here! Upgrade your arsenal.**
This texture pack replaces the **Totem of Undying** in Minecraft 1.21.X with the powerful **Ultimatrix** (Super Omnitrix) from **Ben 10: Ultimate Alien**. Designed as a gauntlet, the model fits perfectly onto your wrist to make you look like the ultimate shapeshifter. 🧬🦾

> **Note:** While it won't trigger "Ultimate" transformations, you'll definitely have the style and protection of a galactic champion.

---

## **🔄 Versions & Compatibility**
The Ultimatrix is a larger model, so make sure to download the correct version for your skin:

* **v10.0.0 (Slim Version):** Calibrated for **Alex**-style skins (3-pixel wide arms).
* **v10.0.1 (Classic Version):** Calibrated for **Steve**-style skins (4-pixel wide arms).

---

### **🛠️ Features**
* **Detailed 3D Gauntlet:** A high-quality model that wraps around the player's arm, staying true to the *Ultimate Alien* design.
* **Off-hand Optimized:** Specifically modeled to look best when equipped in your secondary hand.
* **Purely Aesthetic:** This is a cosmetic overhaul; you still receive the standard Totem of Undying effects.

### **🚀 Quick Setup Guide**
1. **Version:** Compatible with Minecraft **1.21** and higher.
2. **Skin Setup:** Identify if your skin is **Slim** or **Classic** in the Minecraft Launcher.
3. **Installation:** Download the corresponding file (**v10.0.0** or **v10.0.1**) and move it to your `resourcepacks` folder.
4. **Activation:** Enable the pack in the Resource Packs menu in-game.
5. **Master the Power:** Place the **Totem of Undying** in your off-hand to see the Ultimatrix on your wrist!

**Take your survival world to the next level and unleash the power of evolution! 🌀🟢**
